prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt, 85mm bore, 88mm stroke) forged internals upgrade with Tomei 87mm billet crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons for 38psi boost capability on E85 fuel

Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with 0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor wheel, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Revolution RS 3.5" cat-back exhaust system

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with individual cylinder fuel trims, dual Bosch 028 high-flow fuel pumps, ID1000x injectors, and a custom-mapped ignition system utilizing Denso Iridium IK24 spark plugs gapped at 0.028" for 550whp on E85
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody conversion with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and overfenders (Evo V-specific fitment) paired with a Voltex Type-5 rear wing and custom 3M Matte Graphite Grey vinyl wrap

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, Eibach ERS 1000lb/in springs, and spherical bearing top mounts, combined with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars and a full Cusco 4-point bolt-in roll cage (GSR RS chassis reinforcement)

Recaro SRD-E full carbon fiber bucket seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay with AIM MXS Strada digital dash display
